discrepancies.description: The Chassis Number on the Customs Declaration (JTEHH20V400278836) does not match the Chassis Number on the CVC (JTEHH20V400278835).
discrepancies.evidence_summary: Customs Declaration states JTEHH20V400278836, CVC states JTEHH20V400278835.

discrepancies.description: The Declared CIF Value on the Customs Declaration (1,210,000 XAF) differs from the Taxable Value on the CVC (1,460,000 XAF).
discrepancies.evidence_summary: Customs Declaration states 1,210,000 XAF, CVC states 1,460,000 XAF.

discrepancies.description: The HS Code on the Customs Declaration (8703.24.00.000) does not match the HS Code on the CVC (870323 90 990 0). The declared HS code suggests an engine capacity over 3000cc, while the CVC indicates 2,000cc.
discrepancies.evidence_summary: Customs Declaration states 8703.24.00.000, CVC states 870323 90 990 0. CVC Engine Capacity: 2,000 CV.

discrepancies.description: The Customs Declaration states the Country of Origin as UK, while the Bill of Lading indicates the exporter is based in China. This discrepancy requires investigation to determine the actual origin of the vehicle.
discrepancies.evidence_summary: Customs Declaration states Country of Origin: UK, Bill of Lading states Exporter: ZHEJIANG CHINA.
